title: Agent Turn Processing Loop
interaction_flow: Caller → agent_runner_loop: agent_runner_loop(client, system_prompt, user_input, handler, tools_schema, max_turns=40)
agent_runner_loop: init messages=[{system}, {user: initial_user_content or user_input}], turn=0, handler._done_hooks=[], handler.max_turns=max_turns
--- LOOP START: while turn < handler.max_turns ---
agent_runner_loop: turn += 1; yield 'LLM Running (Turn N)...'
agent_runner_loop: [every 10 turns] client.last_tools = '' (reset tool descriptions)
agent_runner_loop → client: client.chat(messages=messages, tools=tools_schema) → response_gen
agent_runner_loop: response = yield from response_gen (verbose) OR exhaust(response_gen) (non-verbose)
agent_runner_loop: parse response.tool_calls → tool_calls list [{tool_name, args, id}]; if no tool_calls → [{tool_name:'no_tool', args:{}}]
--- FOR EACH tool_call in tool_calls ---
agent_runner_loop: yield tool display string (name + pretty JSON args)
agent_runner_loop → BaseHandler: handler.dispatch(tool_name, args, response, index=ii) → generator
--- INSIDE BaseHandler.dispatch ---
BaseHandler.dispatch: method_name = f'do_{tool_name}'
BaseHandler.dispatch → try_call_generator: try_call_generator(self.tool_before_callback, tool_name, args, response) → prer
BaseHandler.dispatch → try_call_generator: try_call_generator(self.do_{tool_name}, args, response) → ret (StepOutcome)
BaseHandler.dispatch → try_call_generator: try_call_generator(self.tool_after_callback, tool_name, args, response, ret)
BaseHandler.dispatch → agent_runner_loop: return StepOutcome(data, next_prompt, should_exit)
[alt: tool_name=='bad_json'] BaseHandler.dispatch → agent_runner_loop: return StepOutcome(None, next_prompt=msg, should_exit=False)
[alt: unknown tool] BaseHandler.dispatch: yield '未知工具: {tool_name}'; return StepOutcome(None, next_prompt='未知工具...', should_exit=False)
--- BACK IN agent_runner_loop, evaluating StepOutcome ---
agent_runner_loop: [if outcome.should_exit] exit_reason = {result:'EXITED', data:outcome.data}; break
agent_runner_loop: [if not outcome.next_prompt] exit_reason = {result:'CURRENT_TASK_DONE', data:outcome.data}; break
agent_runner_loop: [if next_prompt starts with '未知工具'] client.last_tools = '' (reset tool cache)
agent_runner_loop: collect tool_results.append({tool_use_id, content: json(outcome.data)}); next_prompts.add(outcome.next_prompt)
--- END FOR EACH tool_call ---
agent_runner_loop: [if next_prompts empty or exit_reason and _done_hooks] next_prompts.add(handler._done_hooks.pop(0))
agent_runner_loop → BaseHandler: handler.turn_end_callback(response, tool_calls, tool_results, turn, joined_next_prompts, exit_reason) → next_prompt
agent_runner_loop: messages = [{role:'user', content:next_prompt, tool_results:tool_results}] (history kept in Session)
--- LOOP END ---
agent_runner_loop: [if exit_reason] handler.turn_end_callback(response, tool_calls, tool_results, turn, '', exit_reason) [final callback]
agent_runner_loop → Caller: return exit_reason OR {result:'MAX_TURNS_EXCEEDED'}
key_relationships: agent_runner_loop depends_on BaseHandler (dispatch, turn_end_callback, _done_hooks, max_turns, current_turn)
BaseHandler.dispatch depends_on try_call_generator (to handle both generator and plain functions)
try_call_generator wraps any callable — yields streamed output, returns final value via StopIteration
StepOutcome: dataclass with fields data:Any, next_prompt:Optional[str]=None, should_exit:bool=False
exhaust(g): drains generator and returns StopIteration.value (used in non-verbose mode)

termination_conditions._done_hooks: If next_prompts empty, pops from handler._done_hooks before breaking

generator_pattern_notes: agent_runner_loop is itself a generator (uses 'yield' for streaming output). dispatch is also a generator via try_call_generator. exhaust() drains a generator to get its return value. Both verbose and non-verbose paths handle generator output.

key_method_signatures.agent_runner_loop: agent_runner_loop(client, system_prompt, user_input, handler, tools_schema, max_turns=40, verbose=True, initial_user_content=None) -> generator yielding str, returns exit_reason dict
key_method_signatures.BaseHandler.dispatch: dispatch(self, tool_name, args, response, index=0) -> generator, returns StepOutcome
key_method_signatures.BaseHandler.tool_after_callback: tool_after_callback(self, tool_name, args, response, ret) -> None
key_method_signatures.BaseHandler.turn_end_callback: turn_end_callback(self, response, tool_calls, tool_results, turn, next_prompt, exit_reason) -> next_prompt:str
key_method_signatures.try_call_generator: try_call_generator(func, *args, **kwargs) -> generator, returns func's return value

important_notes: Single message context window per turn — only the latest user message is sent (history kept in client Session). Tool results are attached as 'tool_results' on the user message. 'no_tool' is synthesized when response has no tool_calls. Unknown-tool responses reset client.last_tools to force tool re-description on next turn.
